---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new command or improvement
labels: enhancement
assignees: TechnifiedWorld
---

## What settings page or shortcut do you want added?

Describe the page clearly (e.g. "Bluetooth settings").

## ms-settings URI (if known)

```
ms-settings:
```

If you are unsure, leave this blank. A list of valid URIs is available at:
https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/apps/develop/launch/launch-settings

## Suggested short and long command aliases

| Short | Long |
|-------|------|
| `bt` | `bluetooth` |

## Why would this be useful?

Briefly explain the use case.
